creator: axel.burwitz@arcor.de
text:
after cvsup I installed fusefs-ntfs (ntfs-3g) from ports, and the install
went without errors.

But:
- only read from but no write to NTFS partitions work
- the mount command as described in the ntfs-3g man page does not work, 
  it gives "mount: exec mount_ntfs-3g not found in /sbin:/usr/sbin: No such file   
  or directory"
- and there is no mount_ntfs-3g on the system

rgds
Axel
